candidates.why: A separate operating D&A line is present above operating income, but it is a single company-wide by-nature line with no indication that it specifically belongs to Raw materials / COGS. Adding it to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting across operating buckets.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is only 'Raw materials'. The visible D&A row is separate from that bucket, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales depreciation or amortization. Conservatively do not add it to COGS.

candidates.why: A distinct operating D&A line appears above operating income at the same level as Personnel expenses, Other operating expenses, and Research & Development Expense. It therefore appears outside the previously selected XSGA component rows rather than embedded within them, so it should be added separately to avoid omission.

variables.notes: The statement is presented by nature, and 'Depreciation & Amortization' is a separate operating expense line, not a sub-component of the selected XSGA rows. Since XSGA_COMPONENTS final_choice does not already include this line, add it separately. No more granular SG&A/R&D D&A split is shown, and there is no competing D&A summary/component set.
